sourcesContent:
const en = {
  common: {

          id: 2,
          name: "Tran Van Nam",
          role: "HR Manager - FPT Software",
          rating: 5,
          content:
            "We have recruited many quality interpreters through G-Bridge. The recruitment process is fast and efficient.",
        },
        {
          id: 3,
          name: "Le Thi Huong",
          role: "Freelance Translator",
          rating: 4,
          content:
            "Beautiful interface, easy to use. I found many projects that match my skills.",
        },
      ],
    },

  },
